Avoid obstacles that knock items off your stack. At the end, serve your completed drinks to waiting customers for coins. Use coins to unlock new cup designs and upgrades that boost your earnings. Stack and serve the perfect coffee! Guide your growing tower of cups through a multi-lane track, collecting empty cups, filling them with coffee, adding sleeves and lids to complete drinks. Complete drinks earn more coins!

if (screenY > 50 && screenY < 200 && collectible.type === ITEM_CUP) { if (currentLane < collectible.lane) action.right = true; else if (currentLane > collectible.lane) action.left = true; break; } } } return action; } function getRandomAction(state) { const rand = Math.random(); return { left: rand < 0.1, right: rand > 0.9, boost: rand > 0.95, dodgeLeft: false, dodgeRight: false }; } export function get_automated_testing_action(state) { switch (state.controlMode) { case "TEST_1": return getBasicTestAction(state); case "TEST_2": return getTestWinAction(state); case "TEST_3": return getDefensiveAction(state); default: return getRandomAction(state); } } // Expose globally window.get_automated_testing_action = get_automated_testing_action; export default get_automated_testing_action; Coffee Stack

Coffee Stack

Stack and serve the perfect coffee! Guide your growing tower of cups through a multi-lane track, collecting empty cups, filling them with coffee, adding sleeves and lids to complete drinks. Avoid obstacles that knock items off your stack. At the end, serve your completed drinks to waiting customers for coins. Use coins to unlock new cup designs and upgrades that boost your earnings. Complete drinks earn more coins!

Arrow Left/Right: Move stack horizontally | Arrow Up: Speed boost | Z: Quick dodge left | Shift: Quick dodge right
